---
title: "config.yml"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Runtime configuration for MODIS-Aqua primary productivity processing.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.yaml}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/config/config.yml >}}
```

:::
